# Argus Lab Build Notes

---

## Purpose

This directory is for build planning notes and implementation support documents that are not formal chronological build logs.

Formal build history belongs in:

    build-logs/

---

## Use This Directory For

- build planning
- phase planning
- implementation checklists
- environment setup notes
- design-to-build transition notes
- temporary planning documents that support implementation

---

## Do Not Use This Directory For

- final architecture docs
- scenario definitions
- validation strategy
- training design
- formal build logs

Those belong in their dedicated directories.

---

## Rule

If a note becomes authoritative, move it to the correct long-term documentation location.
